sections.paragraph:
ἐμβαίνω [ἐν, βαίνω ‘walk, step’; ‘go in, step in’] ‘step in’

—a. get in(to) in NT pre-dominately of entry into a fishing boat, and most often with εἰς Mt 8:23; Mk 4:1; of entry for departure on a ship go on board, board, embark Ac 21:6 v.l.

—b. of entry into a pool get in J 5:3 [4] v.l.
